title: Release of draft Part I: Health Professional Information and Part II: Scientific Information - Guidance Document: Product Monograph - Canada.ca
content:
## Release of draft Part I: Health Professional Information and Part II: Scientific Information - Guidance Document: Product Monograph

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

### Notice to the reader:
The online consultation is now closed.
As part of the Health Products and Food Branch's Plain Language Labelling Initiative, Health Canada is working to improve drug product labels. In June 2014, Health Canada began implementation of the revised Patient Medication Information section of the Product Monograph. Health Canada is now proposing revisions to Part I: Health Professional Information, and Part II: Scientific Information - Guidance Document: Product Monograph .
This consultation is open for comment starting December 19, 2014 until March 4, 2015 . Please select and read through the link below titled "consultation document". Once read please submit your comments via email, fax or by mail to:
- Policy_Bureau_Enquiries@hc-sc.gc.ca
- Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs Therapeutic Products Directorate Health Products and Food Branch Health Canada 1600 Scott Streetv Holland Cross, Tower B 2 nd Floor, Address Locator 3102C1 Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9
- Telephone: 613-948-4623 Fax: 613-941-1812
Consultation Document
Interested parties are encouraged to provide comments and suggestions by March 4, 2015 .

## Reporting to Canadians
Health Canada will make the results of this consultation available on this web site.
If you have any questions, contact us at Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs .
